title: centaurea lainzii
intro: Centaurea lainzii, also known as the 'Bastet's thistle', is a species of thistle in the sunflower family native to Spain. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Centaurea lainzii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Centaurea lainzii include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
